text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
An exceptionally high number of over 150,000
spectators have come to watch the Yasuda Kinen
this year!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, and I'm so grateful for each and every o—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Members
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment the audience sees Fuji Kiseki enter
the paddock, thunderous clapping and cheering
echoes throughout the track.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Fuji, let's go! You can do it, yeah, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
I can't hear you! Come on, cheer like you really
mean it! One more time!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You're all so fired up already!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm bringing you another miracle today as well, so
don't you dare blink!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, she's just so cool!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I got 10,000 views on a blog post I wrote about
her, so I just had to come today to cheer her on!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Look, "#FujiKisekiAtTheYasudaKinen" is trending
at number one!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Many people have come today to witness a
miracle with their own eyes! To be honest, I can't
wait to see it either!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hishiama! Hey. Um...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What's with you today? Something's off.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Really? Maybe it's because I changed my
shampoo.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sure, whatever. If you say so. It's in bad taste to
interrogate someone before a one-on-one
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
In any case, best to focus now. Once you enter
the gate, nobody's gonna show ya any mercy, no
matter your condition.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha. Yeah, you're right. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen begins with all eyes glued to
Fuji Kiseki!
